{{Quote|The entire Dornean Navy numbers barely eighty vessels.|[[Cian Marook]]|<ref name="BtS" />}}
The '''Dornean Navy''' was the [[Planetary Security Forces|space defense fleet]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dornea/Legends|Dornea]] and the [[Dornean/Legends|Dornean]] people. It operated in the [[Dominus sector/Legends|Dominus sector]].

==History==
{{Quote|The Dornean Navy successfully defended Dornea's independence throughout the reign of Palpatine, against Imperial forces several times as large.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|<ref name="BtS" />}}
Although it contained just eighty [[Starship/Legends|starships]], the Dornean Navy successfully [[Dornea's war against the Empire|resisted]] the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] attempts to occupy the sector prior and during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CTD" />

Just prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] contacted the Dornean Navy to request help in their upcoming battle. The Navy responded by covertly sending its two new [[Braha'tok-class gunship/Legends|''Braha'tok''-class gunships]], ''[[Braha'tok]]'' and ''[[Torktarak]]''. [[Kiles L'toth]], commander of the ''Braha'tok'', subsequently retired from the Dornean Navy, whereas ''Torktarak''{{'s}} commanding officer, [[Etahn A'baht]] was promoted to [[General/Legends|General]] and continued to serve in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]].<ref name="DB" />

Etahn A'baht returned to the Dornean Navy during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] after he resigned his New Republic commission in protest at the strategy [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Sien Sovv]] and [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Turk Brand]] had adopted against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Under his command, the Dornean Navy repelled all Yuuzhan Vong into the [[Dominus sector/Legends|Dominus sector]]. The Navy's successful defense of their sector would later be compared unfavorably to the New Republic's military strategy in [[Confederation]] propaganda during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="TEGtW" />

The Dornean Navy was notable for using ranks that were rendered according to [[Army/Legends|army]] usage in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]], rather than the normal conventions of interstellar fleets. For example, its flag officers were graded as [[General/Legends|Generals]] rather than [[Admiral/Legends|Admirals]].
